_comments.provider: LLM provider to use: 'openai' (default, also works with vLLM) or 'asksage' (Ask Sage API). When set to 'asksage', the asksage_email and asksage_api_key fields are required.
_comments.openai_api_key: Your OpenAI API key. Required when using the hosted OpenAI service. Leave as an empty string or omit when using a local vLLM server.
_comments.base_url: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, including the /v1 suffix. Set this to point at a local vLLM server, e.g. 'http://192.168.1.50:8000/v1'. Leave as an empty string (or omit) to use the hosted OpenAI API. Only used when provider is 'openai'.
_comments.asksage_email: Your Ask Sage account email. Required when provider is 'asksage'.
_comments.asksage_api_key: Your Ask Sage static API key. Required when provider is 'asksage'.
_comments.model: Model name understood by the server. For OpenAI: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, etc. For vLLM: the Hugging Face model ID used when the server was started. For Ask Sage: use models from the /get-models endpoint (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet).
_comments.repositories: List of local git repos to monitor. name = display label, path = absolute path on disk
_comments.schedule_minutes: How often to check for new commits (in minutes). Set to 0 to run once and exit.
_comments.lookback_commits: Max number of recent commits to process on first run per repo
_comments.dashboard_port: Local port for the web dashboard
